TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: === Takaray a sowal === O 'axanan hananay a pangangan, o roma a niyaro' o 'anengang hananay , malecaday to o kamaro'an no tamdaw.I nolitengan ho cowa kaci'anengang ko to'as a tamdaw, ano komaen to, ano malaholol to hakakanan sanay ko kamaro'.ira ko kasasiromaroma no 'anengang, kahenayay a mafiyal ko oo' ato tatelecan, orasaka ikor to i,misanga' to to 'anengang, ira ko o mitorikan to oway, o roma o mito'to'an a kilang, pa'eneray ko matiniay. Anini sato a mihecahecan, ira to ko masamaamaanay a 'anengang, i loma' i, sahetoay o safa hanany a o katol no kolong ko sapisanga'. itini i pitilidan o kilang a 'anengang, i pikaikian i o 'alomi a 'anengang. kasasiromaroma Takal: o takal hanay i opasasa hananay no 'amis i laloma' , o tadadafong no laloma'. Ano patayraen ipapotal a miteli i o sasa' hanay. O ta'angayay a 'anengan. Sasa': ta'angayay a 'anengan hananay ko sasa'
S.PHON: === takaraj a so~uwa删 === o~u 省axanan 魔ananaj a pa艐a艐an, o~u ro~uma a nijaro~u省 o~u 省an蓹艐a艐 魔ananaj , ma删蓹师a涩~僧aj to~u o~u kamaro~u省an no~u tam涩~僧aw.i no~u删it蓹艐an 魔o~u 师o~uwa ka师i省an蓹艐a艐 ko~u to~u省as a tam涩~僧aw, ano~u ko~uma蓹n to~u, ano~u ma删a魔o~u删o~u删 to~u 魔akakanan sanaj ko~u kamaro~u省.ira ko~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u 省an蓹艐a艐, ka魔蓹najaj a mafija删 ko~u o~uo~u省 ato~u tat蓹删蓹师an, o~urasaka iko~ur to~u i,misa艐a省 to~u to~u 省an蓹艐a艐, ira ko~u o~u mito~urikan to~u o~uwaj, o~u ro~uma o~u mito~u省to~u省an a ki删a艐, pa省蓹n蓹raj ko~u matiniaj. anini sato~u a mi魔蓹师a魔蓹师an, ira to~u ko~u masamaamaanaj a 省an蓹艐a艐, i 删o~uma省 i, sa魔蓹to~uaj o~u safa 魔ananj a o~u kato~u删 no~u ko~u删o~u艐 ko~u sapisa艐a省. itini i piti删i涩~僧an o~u ki删a艐 a 省an蓹艐a艐, i pikaikian i o~u 省a删o~umi a 省an蓹艐a艐. kasasiro~umaro~uma taka删: o~u taka删 魔anaj i o~upasasa 魔ananaj no~u 省amis i 删a删o~uma省 , o~u ta涩~僧a涩~僧afo~u艐 no~u 删a删o~uma省. ano~u patajra蓹n ipapo~uta删 a mit蓹删i i o~u sasa省 魔anaj. o~u ta省a艐ajaj a 省an蓹艐an. sasa省: ta省a艐ajaj a 省an蓹艐an 魔ananaj ko~u sasa省
S.FORM: === Takaray a sowal === O 'axanan hananay a pangangan, o roma a niyaro' o 'anengang hananay , malecaday to o kamaro'an no tamdaw.I nolitengan ho cowa kaci'anengang ko to'as a tamdaw, ano komaen to, ano malaholol to hakakanan sanay ko kamaro'.ira ko kasasiromaroma no 'anengang, kahenayay a mafiyal ko oo' ato tatelecan, orasaka ikor to i,misanga' to to 'anengang, ira ko o mitorikan to oway, o roma o mito'to'an a kilang, pa'eneray ko matiniay. Anini sato a mihecahecan, ira to ko masamaamaanay a 'anengang, i loma' i, sahetoay o safa hanany a o katol no kolong ko sapisanga'. itini i pitilidan o kilang a 'anengang, i pikaikian i o 'alomi a 'anengang. kasasiromaroma Takal: o takal hanay i opasasa hananay no 'amis i laloma' , o tadadafong no laloma'. Ano patayraen ipapotal a miteli i o sasa' hanay. O ta'angayay a 'anengan. Sasa': ta'angayay a 'anengan hananay ko sasa'
S.PHON: === takaraj a so~uwa删 === o~u 省axanan 魔ananaj a pa艐a艐an, o~u ro~uma a nijaro~u省 o~u 省an蓹艐a艐 魔ananaj , ma删蓹师a涩~僧aj to~u o~u kamaro~u省an no~u tam涩~僧aw.i no~u删it蓹艐an 魔o~u 师o~uwa ka师i省an蓹艐a艐 ko~u to~u省as a tam涩~僧aw, ano~u ko~uma蓹n to~u, ano~u ma删a魔o~u删o~u删 to~u 魔akakanan sanaj ko~u kamaro~u省.ira ko~u kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u 省an蓹艐a艐, ka魔蓹najaj a mafija删 ko~u o~uo~u省 ato~u tat蓹删蓹师an, o~urasaka iko~ur to~u i,misa艐a省 to~u to~u 省an蓹艐a艐, ira ko~u o~u mito~urikan to~u o~uwaj, o~u ro~uma o~u mito~u省to~u省an a ki删a艐, pa省蓹n蓹raj ko~u matiniaj. anini sato~u a mi魔蓹师a魔蓹师an, ira to~u ko~u masamaamaanaj a 省an蓹艐a艐, i 删o~uma省 i, sa魔蓹to~uaj o~u safa 魔ananj a o~u kato~u删 no~u ko~u删o~u艐 ko~u sapisa艐a省. itini i piti删i涩~僧an o~u ki删a艐 a 省an蓹艐a艐, i pikaikian i o~u 省a删o~umi a 省an蓹艐a艐. kasasiro~umaro~uma taka删: o~u taka删 魔anaj i o~upasasa 魔ananaj no~u 省amis i 删a删o~uma省 , o~u ta涩~僧a涩~僧afo~u艐 no~u 删a删o~uma省. ano~u patajra蓹n ipapo~uta删 a mit蓹删i i o~u sasa省 魔anaj. o~u ta省a艐ajaj a 省an蓹艐an. sasa省: ta省a艐ajaj a 省an蓹艐an 魔ananaj ko~u sasa省
